# Eve Thompson

Product Manager for the platform team.

## Background

Eve has 10 years of product management experience. She oversees Project Alpha and Project Beta, coordinating between engineering and stakeholders.

## Responsibilities

- Product roadmap
- Stakeholder communication
- Sprint planning
- Feature prioritization

## Current Work

Managing the Q1 release for Project Alpha. Working with Alice Chen on technical feasibility and Diana Park on user experience.

## Notes

Eve introduced the Agile Methodology practices currently used by the team.
